site.title: STOA — Open Source MCP Gateway for AI Agents
site.description: Open-source AI-native API gateway. Define Once, Expose Everywhere. Connect legacy APIs to AI agents via MCP in minutes. European sovereign, Apache 2.0.

featureCards.title: Everything you need to govern AI agents
featureCards.mcp.title: MCP Gateway
featureCards.mcp.desc: Native Model Context Protocol. AI agents discover and call your APIs through a secure, governed gateway. OAuth 2.1 + PKCE built-in.
featureCards.bridge.title: Legacy Bridge
featureCards.bridge.metric: SOAP, webMethods, Oracle OAM → MCP in 1 day
featureCards.bridge.desc: Connect your existing APIs to the AI agent ecosystem. No rewrite needed — STOA translates protocols and federates identity.
featureCards.uac.title: Universal API Contract
featureCards.uac.metric: Define once, expose as REST, MCP, GraphQL, gRPC
featureCards.uac.desc: One contract definition, multiple protocol exposures. OpenAPI → MCP auto-transform with schema validation at the edge.
featureCards.observability.title: Observability
featureCards.observability.metric: Grafana + Loki + Tempo, out of the box
featureCards.observability.desc: Full-stack observability for API and AI traffic. Token metering per tenant, distributed tracing, real-time dashboards.
featureCards.portal.title: Self-Service Portal
featureCards.portal.desc: Developers find, try, and subscribe to APIs without waiting. Self-service onboarding with automatic key provisioning.
architecture.title: Cloud + On-Premise
architecture.description: Hybrid by design. Your data stays where you need it.
architecture.cloud.title: Cloud (STOA Control Plane)
architecture.onPremise.title: On-Premise (Your Infrastructure)
differentiators.title: What Makes Us Different
differentiators.description: Four pillars that define the STOA approach.
differentiators.mcp.title: MCP-Native
differentiators.mcp.subtitle: Not a plugin. Architecture.
differentiators.mcp.description: MCP is built into the core, not bolted on. Every API you publish is instantly available to AI agents via the Model Context Protocol.
differentiators.uac.title: Universal API Contract
differentiators.uac.subtitle: Define once, expose everywhere.
differentiators.uac.description: One contract powers REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and MCP endpoints. Change once, propagate to all consumers automatically.
differentiators.sovereign.title: European Sovereign
differentiators.sovereign.subtitle: Not US. Not UK. Not CN.
differentiators.sovereign.description: Designed for European data sovereignty. GDPR-native, NIS2-ready, DORA-supportive. Your data never leaves your jurisdiction.
differentiators.oss.title: True Open Source
differentiators.oss.subtitle: Apache 2.0. No BSL. No tricks.
differentiators.oss.description: Full Apache 2.0 license. No feature gates, no usage limits, no enterprise-only modules. Fork it, modify it, ship it.
metrics.title: Built to Ship
standards.title: Built on Open Standards

pricing.description: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
pricing.enterprise.description: For teams that need SLAs, SSO, and dedicated support.
pricing.sovereign.name: Sovereign
pricing.sovereign.description: For regulated industries requiring full data control.
pricing.footer.disclaimer: Pricing details available upon request. Plans and quotas subject to change before general availability.
pricingFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pricingFaq.description: Everything you need to know about STOA pricing and plans.
pricingFaq.a1: Yes. STOA is open source under the Apache 2.0 license. You can self-host the full platform forever at no cost. No usage limits, no feature gates, no trial expiration.
pricingFaq.q2: What's included in the Community plan?
pricingFaq.a2: Everything you need to run an AI-native API gateway: MCP Protocol support, the Control Plane API, Console UI, Developer Portal, basic analytics, and community support via GitHub and Discord.
pricingFaq.a3: Enterprise pricing is based on your deployment scale and support needs. Contact our sales team for a custom quote. We offer flexible options for both cloud-hosted and on-premise deployments.
pricingFaq.a4: Yes. STOA is designed for on-premise and hybrid deployments. Enterprise plans include advanced features like SSO/SAML, multi-environment support, and priority SLA — all deployable in your own infrastructure.
pricingFaq.a5: The Sovereign plan is designed for regulated industries (financial services, healthcare, government) that require dedicated infrastructure, data residency guarantees, and compliance support for frameworks like NIS2 and DORA.
pricingFaq.q6: Do you offer a free trial?
pricingFaq.a6: The Community plan is free forever — no trial needed. You get the full platform with no time limits. For Enterprise and Sovereign plans, we offer guided proof-of-concept engagements.
pricingFaq.q7: How do I migrate from another API gateway?
pricingFaq.a7: STOA provides migration guides for Kong, Gravitee, Apigee, webMethods, and other popular gateways. Our multi-gateway orchestration lets you run STOA alongside your existing gateway during the transition.
pricingFaq.footer: Still have questions? Get in touch
why.title: Why We Built STOA
why.problem1.title: API Gateways weren't built for AI
why.problem1.description: Traditional gateways don't understand MCP, can't meter AI tokens, and treat agent traffic like any other HTTP call.
why.problem2.title: MCP is powerful but ungoverned
why.problem2.description: The Model Context Protocol lets AI agents call tools — but who controls access? How do you audit AI actions?
why.problem3.title: Vendor lock-in is getting worse
why.problem3.description: Most API platforms lock you in. Open source shouldn't mean 'open until you need enterprise features.'
why.solution.title: STOA: The missing governance layer
why.solution.description: One platform for traditional APIs and AI agents. Same policies, same audit trail. Open source core, no bait-and-switch.
why.tagline: AI accelerates actions. STOA restores responsibility.
audience.developers.title: For Developers

audience.architects.title: For Architects & CTOs
audience.architects.item3: **AI cost control** — Token metering per team

comparison.differentiators.title: What Makes STOA Different
comparison.differentiators.mcp.title: MCP-Native
comparison.differentiators.mcp.subtitle: Purpose-built for AI agents from day one
comparison.differentiators.mcp.descripti: Every major gateway now offers MCP plugins. STOA is the only one built MCP-native from day one — no plugins to install, no add-ons to configure, no protocol translation layer.
comparison.differentiators.uac.title: Universal API Contract
comparison.differentiators.uac.subtitle: Define once, expose everywhere
comparison.differentiators.uac.descripti: One contract definition exposes your API across REST and MCP. No duplication, no drift, no maintenance nightmare.
comparison.differentiators.sovereign.des: Built in France, hosted in Europe. Your data stays under European jurisdiction when deployed on European infrastructure.*
comparison.differentiators.oss.title: True Open Source
comparison.differentiators.oss.subtitle: Sustainable open source model
comparison.differentiators.oss.descripti: Apache 2.0 licensed with a commitment to long-term sustainability. No bait-and-switch, no open-core restrictions on essential features.
comparison.features.title: Feature-by-Feature Comparison
comparison.features.subtitle: For the detail-oriented among us
comparison.sovereignty.title: Why European Sovereignty Matters
comparison.sovereignty.description: Kong (US), Tyk (UK post-Brexit), APISIX (China/Apache) are subject to foreign jurisdiction. Gravitee is European but operates an open-core model with cloud-first SaaS. STOA is the only fully open-source (Apache 2.0), on-premise-first European alternative — relevant for central banks, public sector, and regulated industries with NIS2/DORA requirements.
comparison.disclaimer: Feature comparisons are based on publicly available documentation, last verified February 2026. Product capabilities change frequently. We encourage readers to verify current features directly with each vendor. All trademarks belong to their respective owners. We welcome corrections — contact hello@gostoa.dev

valueProps.title: Built for the AI-First World
valueProps.description: Three pillars behind STOA's approach to API management
valueProps.pillar1.title: Stop building custom integrations
valueProps.pillar1.description: Your APIs become AI-callable tools with one config. Auto-discovery, streaming, governance included.
valueProps.pillar2.title: One policy model for everything
valueProps.pillar2.description: Same RBAC for REST APIs and MCP tools. Audit every action, human or AI.
valueProps.pillar3.title: Scale without rebuilding
valueProps.pillar3.description: From solo project to multi-team enterprise. Isolation, quotas, and custom domains built-in.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy — STOA Platform
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for STOA Platform. How we handle your data, analytics, and communications.
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1.title: 1. Who We Are
privacy.section1.text: STOA Platform is an open-source API management project maintained by CAB Ingenierie, a French consulting company. This policy covers the website gostoa.dev and associated services (portal.gostoa.dev, console.gostoa.dev, docs.gostoa.dev).
privacy.section2.title: 2. Data We Collect
privacy.section2.analytics: Website analytics: We use Vercel Analytics to collect anonymous, aggregated page view data. No cookies are set. No personal data is collected by analytics.
privacy.section2.newsletter: Newsletter: If you subscribe to our newsletter (via Buttondown), we store your email address to send updates. You can unsubscribe at any time.
privacy.section2.accounts: Portal / Console accounts: When you create an account on portal.gostoa.dev, we collect your email and name via Keycloak (self-hosted authentication). This data is stored on European infrastructure (OVH, France).
privacy.section2.contact: Contact forms: Emails sent to hello@gostoa.dev, demo@gostoa.dev, or sales@gostoa.dev are processed by our team and not shared with third parties.
privacy.section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
privacy.section3.item1: Provide and improve the STOA Platform services
privacy.section3.item3: Respond to demo requests and support inquiries
privacy.section3.note: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Data Storage & Security
privacy.section4.text: All platform data is hosted on European infrastructure (OVH GRA9, Hetzner FSN1). Authentication is managed by self-hosted Keycloak. Secrets are managed via self-hosted Infisical. No data is stored on US-based cloud providers for production services.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
privacy.section5.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
privacy.section5.item4: Export your data in a portable format
privacy.section5.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.section6.title: 6. Cookies
privacy.section6.text: gostoa.dev does not use tracking cookies. Vercel Analytics is cookie-free. Authentication sessions on portal/console use secure, HTTP-only session cookies strictly necessary for the service.
privacy.section7.title: 7. Contact
